message:
fix(policy): improve posture attestation validation order

Refactor check_posture() to validate attestation properties in a more
logical sequence:

1. Check expiry FIRST before calling is_valid() - this avoids redundant
   checks since is_valid() also validates expiry internally
2. Check schema version explicitly against PostureAttestation::SCHEMA
   constant instead of relying on is_valid()'s broader validation

This change:
- Makes the validation flow more explicit and easier to follow
- Returns the most specific error code for each failure mode
- Avoids potentially confusing "invalid" errors when the real issue
  is expiration

The semantic behavior remains the same but the code is clearer about
what it's checking and why.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
